DebugTimings.Name: Debug Region Paint Timings
DebugTimings.Hint: Log timing details for region paint mask rebuilds, previews, and commits.

ShowPaintHelp.Name: Show Region Paint Help
ShowPaintHelp.Hint: Show the short mouse/keyboard help text in the Region Paint dialog.

Help.Title: Help
Help.CtrlClick: Ctrl-click HSL-fills from the clicked colour.
Help.CtrlShiftClick: Ctrl-Shift-click HSL-erases from the clicked colour.
Help.AltClick: Alt-click fills the clicked source region shape.
Help.ShiftAltClick: Shift-Alt-click erases the clicked source region shape.

Status.Paint: Paint on the canvas to add to the region. Shift-left mouse subtracts.

Notifications.GmOnlyPainting: Indy Regions | Region painting is GM-only.
Notifications.CanvasNotReady: Indy Regions | Canvas is not ready.
Notifications.SceneNotReadyForPainting: Indy Regions | Canvas scene is not ready for region painting.
Notifications.PaintAreaFirst: Indy Regions | Paint an area first.
Notifications.NoSourceShape: Indy Regions | No source region shape under the cursor.
Notifications.PaintingSelectedRegion: Indy Regions | Painting selected Region. Left mouse adds, Shift-left subtracts.
Notifications.PaintRegion: Indy Regions | Paint a Region. Left mouse adds, Shift-left subtracts.
